config.expression: if(isNull({session.custom.cell.name}) || {session.custom.cell.name} = "", "No cell bound", {session.custom.cell.name}) + "  ·  Dedicated terminal - MIP integrated - operator monitoring"

config.script: system.perspective.openPopup("mpp-inventory", "BlueRidge/Components/PlantFloor/InventoryManager", params={"locationId": self.session.custom.cell.locationId}, title="Line Inventory", modal=False, showCloseIcon=True, draggable=True, resizable=True)

tooltip.text: Check component / pass-through inventory in to this line

config.expression: if(isNull({session.custom.cell.locationId}), 'No cell bound to see its open container.', 'No open container at this cell.')

props.text: ByVision - camera scans the tray as a whole - 1 validation event per tray

The camera scans the full tray as a single image once TrayFullFlag asserts - one validation event per tray; positions show each etched serial. A serial placed during a HardwareInterlockEnable=false window is flagged hardware-interlock-bypassed per UJ-16; the audit row captures the bypass.

config.expression: 'When the container reaches ' + toStr({view.custom.container.TargetParts}) + ' pcs and the PLC asserts CompletionConfirmed=1:'

props.text: - AIM Shipper ID claimed from local pool (sync FIFO, sub-millisecond)
- ShippingLabel row inserted with PrintedAt = NULL
- Async print message dispatched to Zebra at this terminal
- Container status flips to Complete - WO auto-finishes

config.script:
c = self.view.custom.container
	cellId = self.session.custom.cell.locationId
	if not c or c.get("Id") is None:
		BlueRidge.Common.Ui.notifyResult({"Status": False, "Message": "No open container at this cell."}, "Assembly")
		return
	result = BlueRidge.Lots.Container.complete(c.get("Id"), operatorConfirmed=True, terminalLocationId=cellId)
	BlueRidge.Common.Ui.notifyResult(result, "Container complete")
	if result and result.get("Status"):
		self.view.custom.refreshToken = (self.view.custom.refreshToken or 0) + 1
